item.title: BeagleBadge – A Linux-powered 4.2-inch ePaper badge based on TI Sitara AM62L32 SoC

probe.title: BeagleBadge - A Linux-powered 4.2-inch ePaper badge based on TI Sitara AM62L32 SoC - CNX Software
probe.description: The BeagleBoard.org Foundation has just introduced the BeagleBadge featuring a 4.2-inch ePaper display and a Linux-capable Texas Instruments Sitata
